stages.name: Ganesh Stage
stages.description: Beginning the journey with strong foundations and blessings.

stages.name: Turtle Stage
stages.description: Slow and steady. SIP discipline and compounding begins.

stages.name: Bus Stage
stages.description: Momentum builds. Income grows and investments accelerate.

stages.name: Train Stage
stages.description: Strong acceleration. Wealth engine picks up significant speed.

stages.name: Flight Stage
stages.description: Life takes off. Financial freedom becomes visible on the horizon.

stages.name: Rocket Stage
stages.description: Hyper growth phase. Investments compound at maximum velocity.

stages.name: Freedom Stage
stages.description: Financial independence achieved. Now it's about true choices in life.

stages.name: Life Upgrade Stage
stages.description: Additional capital for healthcare, experiences, and giving back.
